name: Form Sections
description: Grouped form fields organized into labeled sections with consistent spacing. Supports settings pages, content creation forms, and structured data entry via presets.

settings.description: Grouped form fields for settings pages and profile editing.

slots.section: Repeating group: section title (_heading5), description (_caption _muted), then field rows separated by Separator
slots.field-row: Label + control pair via _flex _flexCol _gap1 or _grid _gc2 for side-by-side
slots.actions: Bottom bar with save Button (primary) and cancel Button (ghost) via _flex _gap3 _justifyEnd

creation.description: Content creation form with photo upload, basics, metadata, and dynamic lists. For recipe/article creation.

slots.basics: Card with title Input, description Textarea
slots.metadata: Card with numeric inputs and segmented controls
slots.dynamic-lists: Cards with dynamic add/remove rows for items

structured.description: Advanced structured form with tabular data entry, hierarchical sections, and auto-calculated fields.

slots.basics: Card with title, description, and scale selector
slots.structured-items: Card with tabular rows: multiple columns of inputs per row
slots.hierarchical-sections: Card with named sections, each containing ordered sub-items
slots.metadata: Card with categorization tags and metadata

slots.section: Repeating group: section title (_heading5), description (_caption _muted), then field rows separated by Separator
slots.field-row: Label + control pair via _flex _flexCol _gap1 or _grid _gc2 for side-by-side
slots.actions: Bottom bar with save Button (primary) and cancel Button (ghost) via _flex _gap3 _justifyEnd
